title: Snappy Herbal Tunisian Potato Starch Wrap
description: A refreshing post-workout dish featuring herbal flavors and a crispy Tunisian potato starch wrap. This meal is satvik-friendly and suitable for a quick snack or light lunch.
instructions: Brush the Tunisian potato starch wraps with ghee or oil for a crispy texture.
Sprinkle both sides of the wraps with Herb de Provence and Dried parsley.
In a small bowl, mix together crumbled feta cheese, chopped fresh mint leaves, salt, and ground black pepper.
Add freshly squeezed lemon juice to the feta mixture and stir well.
